title: aster oregonensis subsp. californicus
intro: Aster oregonensis subsp. californicus, also known as California aster, is a subspecies of the Oregon aster plant, a perennial herb native to the western United States. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever and colds, due to its antipyretic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of California aster include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
